items.title: Refactor Add to Attio sheet to diff-based UI
items.description: Refactor the popup sheet UI to remove redundant sections/buttons, introduce field-level diffing with per-field Update/Skip, improve user-friendly errors while preserve debug detail, and align copy/i18n + TypeScript types with project standards.

items.title: Add LOADING state icon for profile check in progress
items.description: When the extension is checking if a person exists in Attio (during page load or tab switch), show a person silhouette icon without any status indicator instead of the default plus icon. This provides better visual feedback while the state is being determined.

items.title: Make review UI compact with progressive disclosure
items.description: Replace bulky card-based diff rows with a compact, progressive disclosure UI. Initially shows a collapsed header like '3 fields with updates ▼', clicking expands to show field details with Update/Skip buttons. Keeps functionality but improves elegance and space usage.

items.title: Fix LinkedIn contact info modal extraction
items.description: LinkedIn contact info extraction was implemented (ADR-008) but the selectors are outdated. The contact info modal on LinkedIn profile pages shows email, website, and other info but the selectors don't match the current LinkedIn UI. Need to update selectors to match current LinkedIn HTML structure.

items.title: Fix LinkedIn contact info missing fields and modal flashing
items.description:
Intermittently, when the LinkedIn Contact info modal is already open and the user clicks the Add to Attio extension icon, the Contact info modal appears to rapidly open/close (flashing). Additionally, the extension sometimes fails to capture website and connected-since (and all emails/websites) even though they are visible in the Contact info modal.

Steps to reproduce (intermittent):
1. Open a LinkedIn profile (1st-degree connection)
2. Open the LinkedIn 'Contact info' modal
3. Click the Add to Attio extension icon
4. Observe that sometimes the modal begins flashing (opening/closing repeatedly)

Expected: The extension should not cause the modal to flash; it should reliably extract all emails, all websites, and connected-since from the modal when requested.

Actual: Modal sometimes flashes; popup shows 'No website' and may miss connected-since despite being present in the modal.
